global.description: The ad features a dark background with food imagery and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery service with a sale.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: food images
elements.description: Two stylized food images represented as gray rectangles with a slight shadow, suggesting a selection of dishes.

elements.label: PlateSprint SALE
elements.description: Bold, large white text at the top, indicating a sale, with a yellow badge highlighting the word 'SALE'.

elements.label: Hungry? We got you
elements.description: Prominent white text in a friendly font, positioned centrally, inviting viewers to explore food options.

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main body text, providing additional context about the food offerings.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Watch now
elements.description: A bright yellow button with bold white text, positioned at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
